reviews.comment:
Llegamos a las 9.30 y nos dijeron que no podíamos pedir nada para cenar xq la cocina estaba cerrada.
El cocinero se había ido.
Estaba lleno de gente que se iba
Que triste que cuando pueden trabajar no lo aprovechen

(Translated by Google)
We arrived at 9:30 and were told we couldn't order anything for dinner because the kitchen was closed.
The cook had left.
It was full of people leaving.
It's sad that when they have the opportunity to work, they don't take advantage of it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNk02a1d3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es la parada típica al llegar a Chascomús sea de ida o la  vuelta, hay poca gente, las instalaciones están limpias, y lo mejor son las medialunas del ACA,  y la atención en el salón excelente. Mucho mejor que Atalaya lejos....

(Translated by Google)
It's a typical stop when arriving in Chascomús, whether you're heading out or returning. It's uncrowded, the facilities are clean, and the best part is the ACA croissants and the excellent service in the dining room. Much better than Atalaya by far.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXeUtlV3NRRRAB

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for a stopover, the shop is complete, the restrooms are nice, and there's a very good green space, although this area could use a little cleaning.
